column1: # STT A/B phrase set — RECORD each line as the named .wav, reading the text EXACTLY.
# Format:  <wav-filename>\t<exact words you will say (the ground truth)>
# Save the clips into your --clips dir (e.g. ~/voice_capture). 16 kHz mono is ideal
# but the harness resamples/downmixes anything. Speak naturally, normal companion
# distance + volume. Re-record any clip you flub — the reference must match what you said.
# Coverage: domain proper nouns (the hard part), short commands, numbers, and
# natural conversation. Edit freely — add the phrases you actually say to Sully.

column2: Hey Sully, what's on my plate today
Dispatch a worker to the LogueOS companion repo
Set up the Jetson Orin Nano Super for voice
Switch the text to speech from Kokoro to a lighter model
What's the word error rate on the whisper model
Create a new workspace and build a simple button webpage
Remind me to reboot the room machine at nine fifteen tonight
How much memory does the companion app have free
Read that back to me one more time
Cancel the running task and hold the new request
The Tailscale link to the Jetson dropped again
Open the verification log for the last commit
Yes, go ahead and run it
No, not now, let's talk through it first
